title: AHOL Variant Manifest
description: Schema for the variant manifest JSON consumed by ahol.runner.variants.bootstrap_variant. The manifest declares one or more Tier-3 variants. Each variant has a unique name, an ordered mutation bundle (zero or more atomic mutations from the 10 declared types in CONTAMINATION-ANALYSIS.md, plus the install_full_donnyclaude composite for the V4 spike control), and an optional human description. The manifest is the source of truth: a worktree mutation that is not in the manifest is not in the variant. Variant name uniqueness is enforced by the loader, not the schema.

variants.description: One entry per variant. Order is preserved; the orchestrator runs variants in manifest order (subject to concurrency).

name.description: Variant identifier. Must match either the canonical AHOL short form (V followed by digits, for example V7) or the long form (variant-<slug>). Used as the worktree directory suffix and the variant_id in SQLite, OTel spans, and contract payloads. Loader enforces uniqueness across the manifest.

description.description: Optional free-form description. Used in logs and the round summary; not load-bearing for behavior.

mutation_bundle.description: Ordered collection of atomic and composite mutations applied to a freshly bootstrapped Tier-2 baseline to produce the Tier-3 variant worktree. Empty list (mutations: []) is valid and produces V0-style bare baseline.

mutation_type.description: 10 atomic mutation types from CONTAMINATION-ANALYSIS.md plus the install_full_donnyclaude composite used by the V4 spike control. Unknown types raise ValueError in apply_mutation.

params.description: Free-shape per-mutation parameter object. Each handler defines its own required keys; see ahol.runner.variants for handler signatures.
